title: Mid-Level Instructional Designer at Adda247 Global Group

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Instructional Designer at Adda247 Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Adda247 Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Vadodara location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Adda247 Global Group:
Adda247 Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adda247 Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
